title: lowiorchis lowiana
intro: Lowiorchis lowiana, also known as the Coralroot, is a perennial orchid plant native to the western regions of North America. Traditionally, the plant's tubers have been used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lowiorchis lowiana are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the relief of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the tubers are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
